name: overseer

scripts.lint:all: npm run lint --prefix ./src/common/ && npm run lint --prefix ./src/client/ && npm run lint --prefix ./src/server/
scripts.build:all: npm run build:client-app && npm run build:server-app
scripts.set-version: npm run lint:all && npm run build:all && node ./tools/set-version.js
